summary: Smoothed the chapter 1 to chapter 2 handoff by removing a near-duplicate transition beat at the cut while preserving the same stakes, tone, and chapter-end pressure. The opening was already structurally distinct from the adjacent visible opening, so no entry rewrite was needed.
edits: Rephrased the final breathing beat to avoid duplicating chapter 2's opening cadence.
Let the chapter end on Sarah waking beside him and expecting Dominic.
